# InkMaster Studio

> InkMaster Studio is a browser-based creator tool for turning uploaded artwork into print-ready PNG files for Printify and print-on-demand shops.

## Product

- [InkMaster Studio](https://inkmasterstudio.com/): Local-first Printify file prep for creators who need product-sized print-ready artwork.

## Capabilities

- Artwork upload and local saved designs
- Printify product presets
- Plain-language file checks
- Artwork cleanup and background removal
- PNG export with DPI metadata
- Advanced mockups, proofs, batch tools, and production exports when Advanced mode is enabled

## Notes

- User artwork is handled through the app workflow.
- AI cleanup requests are routed through server-side API handling rather than exposing provider keys in the browser.
